allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess | Format-Table; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table)

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, Path | Format-List; \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($proc.Id\)"\).CommandLine })
